## LibraryRuntime.Internal.calculateWeightContributions() function

Calculate weight contributions for all ingredients. Returns detailed breakdown of how each ingredient contributes to total weight.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function calculateWeightContributions(ingredients: ReadonlyArray<IFillingIngredient>, context?: IWeightCalculationContext): IWeightContribution[];
```
